ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solar_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar energy system */,
  "system_size" TEXT /* Size of the solar system in kW */,
  "cost_per_watt" REAL /* Cost per watt for the system */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the installation */,
  "savings_25_years" REAL /* Projected savings over 25 years */,
  "payback_period" TEXT /* Estimated payback period in years */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the solar panels */,
  "warranty_years" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the solar panels */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the solar panels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "energy_usage_kwh" REAL /* Monthly energy usage in kWh */,
  "energy_provider" TEXT /* Current energy provider */,
  "current_energy_cost" REAL /* Monthly energy cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installers" (
  "installer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installer */,
  "installer_name" TEXT /* Name of the installer company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the installer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the installer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the installer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the installer */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider for the installer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client receiving the quote */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar system being quoted */,
  "installer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installer providing the quote */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date the quote was generated */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Expiration date of the quote */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the solar system */,
  "monthly_payment" REAL /* Monthly payment amount */,
  "financing_option" TEXT /* Financing option chosen by the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES solar_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_installer_id FOREIGN KEY ("installer_id") REFERENCES installers ("installer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the transaction */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid by the client */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financing_options" (
  "financing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financing option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the financing option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financing option */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate for the financing option */,
  "term_years" INTEGER /* Term of the financing in years */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Down payment required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "incentive_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the incentive */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., homeowner, installer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the user (if applicable) */,
  "installer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installer associated with the user (if applicable) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user within the platform */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_installer_id FOREIGN KEY ("installer_id") REFERENCES installers ("installer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar system associated with the performance record */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance measurement */,
  "energy_generated" REAL /* Amount of energy generated by the system (kWh) */,
  "energy_saved" REAL /* Amount of energy saved by the system (kWh) */,
  "carbon_offset" REAL /* Carbon offset achieved by the system (tons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_performance_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES solar_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client providing the feedback */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar system related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the client */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (1-5 scale) */,
  "recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the client would recommend the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES solar_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installer_ratings" (
  "installer_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installer rating */,
  "installer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installer being rated */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client providing the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the installer (1-5 scale) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review from the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installer_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installer_ratings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installer_ratings_installer_id FOREIGN KEY ("installer_id") REFERENCES installers ("installer_id")
)
